issues.detail: Instructions do not cover error scenarios or edge cases.
Instructions assume Ubuntu apt-get and may not work on other operating systems.

scenarios.name: Web server hostgroup with NRPE checks and team contactgroup
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses the exact nagios4 install, linux-server template, hostgroup web-servers, NRPE-based remote checks, and platform-team contactgroup; baseline often uses generic check_http and skips contactgroup structure.

scenarios.name: Custom API health plugin with perfdata and config verification
scenarios.rationale: Treatment follows the documented getopts plugin pattern with exit 0/1/2 and pipe-separated perfdata plus nagios4 -v verification; baseline writes a curl script but typically omits the perfdata format and verification step.
